caption: A woman named "Nancy Ramya," as identified by the text on the screen, is captured in a medium shot while speaking. She is indoors, positioned in front of a pale wall with light-colored curtains to her left. She wears a light-colored, vertically striped button-down shirt and a black over-the-ear headset with an attached microphone. Throughout the sequence, she remains centered in the frame, speaking with her mouth open and eyes looking slightly downward and to the side. Her head shifts slightly, and her facial expressions change subtly as she continues to talk, but her posture and the surrounding environment remain constant. The lighting is consistent across the scene, and no other people or objects are visible besides the headset and the curtains.
